Video.summary: Take a peek at the region's earliest recorded inhabitants, the Canaanites.
Video.title: The Land of Canaan

Video.summary: What have archaeologists uncovered about the arrival of the Israelites into Canaan?
Video.title: The Arrival of the Israelites

Video.summary: Climb the Monte Caprino, one of Rome's seven hills, to see monumental sculptures and more.
Video.title: Rome: The Eternal City

Video.summary: Take in the grand Piazza Venezia, with its Renaissance and Baroque palaces.
Video.title: The Capitoline and the Colosseum

Video.summary: How did the American West come into being, and how was it shaped by myth?
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Westward the Course of Empire

Video.summary: To understand the American West, you have to understand the mark left by its earliest colonists.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: The West in the Colonial Era

Image.alt: The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era

Video.summary: Begin your study of federalism with a look at the 2000 presidential election dispute between George W. Bush and Al Gore. Examine the historical and philosophical foundations of federalism.
Video.title: Federalism: America's Great Innovation

Video.summary: Step back to the founding of America to explore the rise of our two-party political system. Professor Hoffmann walks you through six phases of party politics.
Video.title: How Federalism Shapes American Politics

Video.summary: In this episode, understand why ancient Egypt had to invent some form of writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Why Egypt Needed Hieroglyphs

Video.summary: Professor Brier shows you how to write each hieroglyph and how to position them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: The Ancient Egyptian Alphabet

Video.summary: Examine how immense wealth and privilege'for some'left its imprint on the city and its history
Video.title: Oscar Wilde's Decadent London

Video.summary: Uncover the history of a church that has been so much more than a place of worship for the people of London
Video.title: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Image.alt: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Video.summary: Consider what the occult really is and how occult practices seek to alter our everyday perspective.
Video.title: What Is the Occult?

Video.summary: Consider these various 'others' and their role in cultures around the world.
Video.title: Fauns, Fairies, and Djinn

Video.summary: Enjoy a preview of the developments that made the medieval period more exciting than was once thought.
Video.title: The Medieval World

Video.summary: Learn how the heritage and ideals of the Roman Empire shaped the early Middle Ages.
Video.title: The Legacy of the Roman World

Image.alt: The Legacy of the Roman World
The Legacy of the Roman World
The Legacy of the Roman World

Video.summary: Professor McNabb discusses the foundation for medieval views of sex and sexuality.
Video.title: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Image.alt: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Video.summary: Consider medieval ideas about procreation and see how everyday people thought about their own bodies.
Video.title: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Image.alt: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Video.summary: Find out what medieval people did behind closed doors and see what could happen when they broke the rules.
Video.title: Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos

Image.alt: Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos
Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos
Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos

Video.summary: Consider the influence of the Church, the clergy, and clerical lawyers on marriage and sexuality.
Video.title: Sex and the Medieval Church

Video.summary: Dig deeper into issues of status and gender as you consider forbidden liaisons and sexual violence.
Video.title: Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages

Image.alt: Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages
Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages
Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages

Video.summary: See how medieval literature plays a powerful role in shaping modern perceptions of life in the Middle Ages.
Video.title: Medieval Fabliaux and Obscene Literature

Video.summary: Continue your examination of medieval literature by studying courtly love in some of its most famous forms.
Video.title: Medieval Romances and Courtly Love

Video.summary: Examine the rules—and double standards—of sex among the monarchs and aristocrats of the Middle Ages.
Video.title: Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous

Image.alt: Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous
Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous
Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous
